title: suregada cicerosperma
intro: Suregada cicerosperma is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to tropical forests in Sri Lanka and India. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Suregada cicerosperma include its potential to treat fever, headache, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antidote for poisoning. Herbal preparations of the plant include extracts and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
